positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a vibrant, glowing bioluminescent forest scene. The main elements are large, stylized ferns, crystalline flora, and glowing, gentle forest spirits integrated into the foliage. Use a high-contrast color palette dominated by deep indigo, electric turquoise, and neon emerald accents. The composition should be symmetrical and centralized, suitable for a repeat pattern or single chest print, rendered in a vector-art style with clean, thick outlines and flat color washes. Cinematic, fantasy, maximalist depth, clean silhouette, perfect for apparel printing.
negative: blurry, noisy, messy, artifacts, signature, watermark, text, logo, copyright, low quality, bad anatomy, multiple subjects, multiple limbs, gradient shading, realistic photo, grainy, overexposed
